ref_text_raw: Also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best-known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin Dynasty.
ref_text_normalized: also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces the best-known of these periods was the three kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the han and the jin dynasty
text: Also, between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch, taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin dynasty.

params.note: autoDecodingConfig; punctuation etc. = API defaults (R-2.4); no diarization

metadata.prompt:
Transcribe the following speech segment in English. Follow these specific instructions for formatting the answer:
* Only output the transcript, with no newlines.
* When transcribing numbers, write the digits, i.e. write 1.7 and not one point seven, and write 100 instead of one hundred etc.
* Only output the transcript, exactly as said in the speech segment.
* Do not continue the speech segment.
* Include everything said in the speech segment.
* Use mathematical notation where needed, eg. x ^ 6Y.
* If there is background speech that is not part of the main conversation, discard the background speech and only output the main conversation.
* If there is no clear speech, just output [BACKGROUND].
* Respond in the original language of the speech, English.

alternatives.transcript: Also, between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch, taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin dynasty.
